---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it.
E.g. "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Who would benefit from this and in what scenario?
E.g. "QA engineers working on Salesforce apps who need..."

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples, or links that help illustrate the request.
